summary: Ship the three acquisition channels — SDK npm packages, the engine binary pinned via per-platform optionalDependencies + standalone assets, the plugin/bundle — fail-loud on a missing platform binary

gate.reason: needs human release setup (npm org + @temper scope, marketplace publish, signing/publish creds) before the mechanical wrappers can be validated end-to-end; channel 1 (SDK publish) also rides the SDK-primary foundation ceremony

new.description: Build the per-target release binaries and publish them to the npm platform packages (channel 2: the engine binary pinned by the SDK via per-platform `optionalDependencies`, plus standalone GitHub release assets), and produce/publish the plugin bundle with its `marketplace.json` (channel 3). Channel auto-detected. Distinct from any CI *check* job, which under the re-cut is a documented two-line user-authored job (`temper check` + `emit --frozen` byte-compare), not a generated file (50-distribution, 'install is two placements').

edit.description: The root `package.json` today is the *private* flume control-plane manifest (`temper-flume-harness`, `private: true`). The npm distribution entry needs platform-specific `optionalDependencies` pointing at per-target prebuilt-binary packages plus a launcher that resolves and execs the platform binary, erroring loudly if none is installed (fail-loud, 50-distribution 'Fail-loud delivery'). Reconcile with the flume manifest (a non-private publish entry, or a split package dir) rather than clobbering it. Scoped `@temper` names per the resolved `(project-name)` fork. NB distinct from sdk/package.json (the SDK authoring-face manifest — channel 1's `temper` core + `@temper/claude-code` provider module).

acceptance: A stranger acquires temper via the SDK's pinned engine binary (per-platform optionalDependencies), standalone release assets, or the plugin/bundle (marketplace.json); a missing platform binary is an install error, never a silent skip (50-distribution 'Fail-loud delivery').
notes: Release infra, mostly outside src/; cargo gates can't validate npm/bundle publish; needs human creds. Re-cut 2026-07-04 (50-distribution 'Three channels'): ch1 = SDK npm (`temper` + `@temper/claude-code`, floors as exported clause arrays); ch2 = engine binary pinned via per-platform optionalDependencies + standalone; ch3 = plugin/bundle via `temper bundle` + marketplace.json. Homebrew/cargo-install no longer first-class channels. Parked on human creds.
